word: G35 - ἀγενεαλόγητος - agenealógētos - ag-en-eh-al-og'-ay-tos - Without descent

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἀγενεαλόγητος

- Transliteration: Agenealogetos

- Phonetic: ag-en-eh-al-og'-ay-tos

- Definition:

1. one whose descent there is no record of, without genealogy

- Origin: from G1 (as negative particle) and G1075

- TDNT entry: 12:05,1

- Part(s) of speech: Adjective

- Strong's: From G1 (as negative particle) and G1075; unregistered as to birth: - without descent.
